Without it the pre-archive arch audit halts with architecture-audit-violations

Design pins: build-time static/fitness scan over factory package shape OR lifecycle-hooks-as-inspectable-API. No site that cannot see module structure

[arch F4, major] bin->core dependency arrow ONLY (shared schema logic lives in core/runtime-adjacent, bin imports it; core never imports bin/codegen); bin lives outside src/ runtime; NEW fitness function asserting no src/ runtime module imports codegen code

[BA 1, major] Intent must motivate reserved-lifecycle-names: pre-handoff the engine caught the collision at the wire; post-handoff it is SDK-owned with zero coverage — author mistake currently surfaces as confusing wire-time failure

[arch F5, minor] Bin CLI contract (name, flags, exit codes, output path/shape) = semver surface, named design deliverable

open_questions_product: D4 mechanism: (a) hand-supplied O v1 [architect verdict: cannot satisfy the chartered problem — ratifying (a) = ratifying 'no teeth', explicit deferral of O2 differentiator; QA: parity fitness physically unmeetable; BA: contradicts problem framing] vs (b) schema.json -> TS codegen dev bin [keeps schema.json hand-authored (README model intact), zero runtime deps, JSON Schema natively carries title/description/default for prompts; costs: bin = new semver surface, staleness lifecycle needs FIT-04-style regenerate-and-diff CI gate (lessons #648 trap), generator dep vs hand-rolled parser, NO postinstall ever (security)] vs (c) Zod-as-source [strongest: drift impossible by construction; costs: FIRST runtime dep in zero-dep SDK, internal fork — Zod types leak into .d.ts (Zod majors become SDK majors) OR Zod stays author-side and (c) degrades to (a)+convention; schema.json becomes build artifact (README mental-model inversion); dependency-acceptance policy must be written NOW (sets D5 precedent)]

D7 exposure: facade harness at ./testing [architect rec: purpose-built runFactoryForTest holding the ONE normative ContractFake + defineFactory internally, NOT name re-exports; FIT-08 preserved via carve-out; needs ADR-0009 amendment (third audience: author-testing) + 4 companion guards (FIT-08 carve-out, dev-only bundle guard, FIT-04 dts baseline, FIT-09 exports entry) + fail-closed parity invariant tested] vs documented hand-rolled pattern [architecturally worse: leaks EngineClient port as de-facto contract, fragments fake fidelity (ADR-0017 premise), false-green author tests]. AMPLIFIER: defineFactory is UNREACHABLE from any installed package today (./core unwired) — D7 must also make the runner reachable; authors cannot RUN a factory at all, not just test it

BA dissent: input-validation failure is the END USER's error (CLI audience), not AuthoringError (author audience) — category error to mix; keep it a distinct non-AuthoringError failure. Security: fail-closed, reuse authoring-rejected. Three positions — owner arbitrates
